versions.version_description: The riffs in parentheses refer to single note passages (e.g. B-C-D-E).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
INSIDE YOUR HEAVEN
Carrie Underwood
Tabbed by:young
Email:youngjt7@yahoo.com

This is my first tab. I'm not completey sure about this.. But it sounds pretty much close to the song. 

Tuning:EADGBe

[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C9[/ch]  [ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G/B[/ch]  [ch]D/F[/ch]  [ch]D2[/ch]
e|--3---3----3---3---3----3---2-------------|
B|--3---3----3---3---3----3---3-------------|
G|--0---0----0---2---0----2---2-------------|
D|--0---2----2---2---0----0---0-------------|
A|--2---3----2---0---2----x---x-------------|
E|--3--------0------------2---2-------------|[/tab]


INTRO: [ch]G[/ch] – [ch]C9[/ch] (2x)

[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
I’ve been down[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C9[/ch] 
Now I’m blessed[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]                          [ch]C9[/ch]
I felt a revelation coming around[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C9[/ch]
I guess it’s right, it’s so amazing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D/F[/ch]           [ch]C9[/ch]
Everytime I see you I’m alive[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]
You’re all I’ve got[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C9[/ch]
You lift me up[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]  -  [ch]G/B[/ch]
The sun and the moonlight[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]         -           [ch]G/B[/ch]
e|----3-3---------------------3----------------------------------------------|
B|----3-3---------------------3----------------------------------------------|
G|----2-2--------0------------0----------------------------------------------|
D|----2-2--------0------------0----------------------------------------------|
A|----0-2--------0------------2----------------------------------------------|
E|---------------------------------------------------------------------------|
Fig. 1[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]C9[/ch]                [ch]D/F[/ch] – [ch]D2[/ch]
All my dreams are in your eyes[/tab]


CHORUS:
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]C9[/ch]
I wanna be inside your heaven[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]Am[/ch] – [ch]G/B[/ch] (Fig.1)
Take me to the place you cry from[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C9[/ch]              [ch]D/F[/ch] – [ch]D2[/ch]
Where the storm blows your way[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]C9[/ch]
And I wanna be the earth that holds you[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Am[/ch]   -
Every bit of air you’re breathing in[/tab]
    G/B (Fig.1)
A soothing wind
[tab]   [ch]C9[/ch]         [ch]D/F[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I wanna be inside your heaven[/tab]

[ch]G[/ch] – [ch]C9[/ch] pause

[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
When we touch[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C9[/ch]
When we love[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]C9[/ch]
The stars light up, the wrong becomes undone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]C9[/ch]
Naturally, my soul surrenders[/tab]
                Am  -  G/B (Fig.1)
The sun and the moonlight
[tab]         [ch]C9[/ch]                [ch]D/F[/ch]
All my dreams are in your eyes[/tab]


[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]D2[/ch]
When minutes turn to days and years[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]Am[/ch]
If mountains fall I’d still be here[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]D2[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
Holding you until the day I die[/tab]
